ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yi (жџіжЇ…). Former subordinate of Gongsun Du turned pirate. He was defeated by Zhang Liao on the coast north of Qing province in 205. Liu Yi was affiliated with Gongsun Du.
